mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_TBL (MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PHONE, MEMBER_EMAIL, STORE_OWNER_NO, STORE_NAME, OPENING_DATE, MEMBER_GRADE ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, #{memberPhone}, #{memberEmail}, #{storeOwnerNo}, #{storeName}, #{openingDate}, #{memberGrade})
